prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2024年理科最低位次约369→187→181→176，持续小幅前移；2025年山西省首次实施新高考（物理类），护理学单独成组导致校最低位次骤降至约13109名，临床医学专业组仍保持约203名高位。2025年基准位次约13109名；该校在山西省理科/物理类计划2021年9人、2022年4人、2023年4人、2024年3人、2025年15人（新高考合并专业组后大幅增加）；2026年计划13人，较2025年减少2人（缩招约13.3%），缩招使竞争略有缓和。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；隶属上海交通大学（软科中国大学排名第4名），为国内顶尖医学院之一，办学层次极高；2026年上海交通大学声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学校管理与学术不端舆情，但整体关注度仍高；抖音热度较热（总排名第42位），短视频曝光量较大；历史投档异常记录较少，2021年河南理科曾出现投档线偏低现象；临床医学A+、口腔医学A+、护理学A-，均为全国顶尖水平；生物学A+、生物医学工程A等支撑学科实力雄厚。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学持续高热推荐，社会报考热度高；护理学专业热度偏热，就业前景良好；山西省2026年物理类考生约167419人，较2025年减少约3.4%，竞争略有缓和；上海交通大学医学院在山西省招生占比约2.2%–3.1%，属跨省招生正常比例；上海作为一线城市对山西考生有较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年新高考改革后护理学专业组拉低校线的结构性因素、2026年计划缩招约13.3%使竞争略有缓和、山西省物理类考生减少约3.4%以及声誉偏负面等影响，在2025年基准13109名基础上预计位次有所前移；预测最低位次约12000名，区间11500–12500名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读）
- 儿科学（卓越班,5+3一体化）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 暂无其他中等难度专业。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 护理学（四年制,含双学士学位）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间内（11500–12500名）建议以护理学（三档）为主力报考方向，临床医学和儿科学（一档）位次需求极高（约200名左右），远超出预测区间，仅适合位次极优的考生冲刺。建议结合自身位次合理选择专业组。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum ranking for science subjects was approximately 369 → 187 → 181 → 176, showing a continuous slight upward trend; in 2025, Shanxi Province implemented the new college entrance examination for the first time (Physics Category), and the separate grouping of Nursing caused the school's minimum ranking to plummet to about 13,109, while the Clinical Medicine major group still maintained a high ranking of about 203. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 13,109; the school's enrollment plan in Shanxi Province for science/Physics Category was 9 in 2021, 4 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 3 in 2024, and 15 in 2025 (significantly increased after merging major groups under the new exam); the 2026 plan is 13, a decrease of 2 from 2025 (a reduction of about 13.3%), which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; affiliated with Shanghai Jiao Tong University (ranked 4th in the Soft Science China University Rankings), it is one of the top medical schools in China, with an extremely high educational level; in 2026, Shanghai Jiao Tong University's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving school management and academic misconduct public opinion, but overall attention remains high; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 42nd overall), with significant short video exposure; there are few historical abnormal admission records, though in 2021, there was a low admission line in Henan for science subjects; Clinical Medicine is A+, Stomatology is A+, Nursing is A-, all at the national top level; Biology is A+, Biomedical Engineering is A+, and other supporting disciplines are strong.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine continues to be highly recommended, with high social application popularity; Nursing is relatively popular, with good employment prospects; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Shanxi Province is about 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 2025, slightly easing competition; Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine's enrollment proportion in Shanxi Province is about 2.2%–3.1%, which is a normal cross-provincial enrollment ratio; Shanghai, as a first-tier city, has a strong regional appeal to Shanxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the structural factor of the Nursing major group lowering the school line after the 2025 new college entrance examination reform, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of about 13.3% slightly easing competition, the decrease of about 3.4% in Physics Category candidates in Shanxi Province, and the somewhat negative reputation, the ranking is expected to move forward from the 2025 baseline of 13,109; the predicted minimum ranking is about 12,000, with a range of 11,500–12,500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Continuous Program)
- Pediatrics (Excellence Class, 5+3 Integrated Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- No other medium-difficulty majors at present.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Nursing (Four-Year Program, including Dual Bachelor's Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Candidates with rankings within the predicted range (11,500–12,500) are advised to focus on Nursing (Tier 3) as the main application direction; Clinical Medicine and Pediatrics (Tier 1) require extremely high rankings (around 200), far beyond the predicted range, and are only suitable for candidates with excellent rankings to attempt. It is recommended to choose major groups reasonably based on one's own ranking.

_translation.university_name_en: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine
